notes: Hybrid SSM cache poisoning fix: is_complete=False entries (captured post-gpl-prefill, state does not match key) now rejected on fetch — repeat-identical prompts on Qwen3.6-JANGTQ/MiniMax/Nemotron no longer produce <think></think> loops. Slower first re-hit (full re-prefill) but correct; LLM scheduler async rederive path remains the fast warm route for long sessions.
